summary: Iteration 332 - Taxonomy restructure + category enhancements testing. Backend API tests: 8 passed, 1 failed, 6 skipped. Frontend UI tests: All passed. CRITICAL BUG: 25 orphan categories exist with invalid group_ids pointing to deleted groups.

critical.issue: 25 orphan categories have invalid group_ids pointing to deleted groups. Categories like 'Office Supplies', 'Apparel', 'Printed Materials' etc. still reference old group IDs that no longer exist.
critical.root_cause: sync_settings_categories_to_taxonomy() deletes old standalone groups but doesn't clean up or reassign categories that were linked to them

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Update sync_settings_categories_to_taxonomy() to either delete orphan categories or reassign them to the correct Products/Services group based on their category_type
The sync function at lines 252-258 deletes old groups but leaves categories orphaned. Need to add logic to handle orphan categories before or after deleting old groups.
critical_code_review_comments: catalog_taxonomy_service.py: sync function has unreachable code at lines 263-264 (duplicate return statements)
catalog_taxonomy_service.py: When deleting old groups (lines 252-258), orphan categories are not handled - they retain invalid group_ids

success_rate.backend: 53% (8/15 tests passed, 6 skipped due to rate limiting, 1 failed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Taxonomy restructure partially complete. 2 top-level groups (Products, Services) exist correctly. However, 25 categories have orphan group_ids from deleted groups. The sync function needs to be fixed to handle orphan categories.
